brand.disclaimer: Content is for informational purposes only and does not constitute advice.

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.subtitle: Create a new account
signup.name: Name
signup.successDescription: Welcome! Redirecting you to the home screen.

passwordReset.dialogDescription: We'll send a password reset link to your email.
passwordReset.successDescription: Password reset link has been sent.

resetPassword.invalidDescription: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.successDescription: You can now sign in with your new password. Redirecting to home...
resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.

verifyEmail.invalidDescription: This verification link is invalid or has expired. Please sign up again.
verifyEmail.successDescription: Your account has been successfully verified. You can continue by signing in from the mobile app.
verifyEmail.openAppHint: If the app doesn't open, you can open GolMetrik and sign in manually.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.warningDescription: Deleting your account will permanently remove all your data and it cannot be recovered.
deleteAccount.premiumNotice: If you have a premium subscription, we recommend cancelling it from the Google Play Store first.
deleteAccount.confirmInstructionPrefix: To confirm you want to delete your account, type
deleteAccount.toastDoneDescription: Your account and all data have been deleted successfully.
deleteAccount.toastErrorDescription: An error occurred while deleting your account.

errors.consentRequiredDescription: You must accept the Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.rateLimitLogin: Too many sign-in attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
errors.rateLimitSignup: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
errors.emailAlreadyRegisteredDescription: Sign in from the Sign In tab.
errors.passwordUpdateError: An error occurred while updating the password.
errors.passwordUpdateSuccessDescription: Your password has been updated successfully.

legal.translationNotice: The official text is in Turkish. Translations are provided for information only.

welcome.title: Welcome to GolMetrik AI! ⚽
welcome.description: AI-powered match analysis. Get professional predictions in just 3 steps.

select.title: Pick a League, Tap a Match
select.description: Premier League, La Liga, Serie A... Choose any match and let AI analyze it instantly.

analyze.title: Get Detailed Analysis
analyze.description: Form, H2H, goal stats and AI insights on a single screen. Try it now!
